overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban plaza at dusk in Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves from a tree-lined pedestrian walkway past a trash enclosure into an open-air outdoor gym where NPCs are weightlifting and training, surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian walkway with commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a paved path lined with trees, passing by a commercial building with illuminated signage

entered.detail: mature trees with dense canopies lining the left side of the walkway
modern building facade with green trim and illuminated storefront signage
glowing commercial signs in Asian characters above the storefront
smooth paved pedestrian path with yellow curb blocks on the left edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tree-lined pedestrian walkway at dusk, with the camera moving forward past mature trees on the left and a commercial building with green trim and neon signage on the right. The path is paved and relatively empty, with the warm glow of artificial lights mixing with the fading natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza transition with waste management area

events.description: exits the tree-lined walkway and enters an open plaza area with visible trash enclosures

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past trash bins on the right, approaching an outdoor gym area with other pedestrians visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person searching through trash bins and recycling containers

entered.detail: green industrial waste containers and recycling bins along the building wall
outdoor fitness structures and weightlifting stations visible in the plaza ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the enclosed walkway into a more open plaza, passing green trash and recycling bins where an NPC is searching. The ground transitions to concrete as the outdoor gym equipment becomes visible in the distance, with scattered pedestrians moving through the space.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall glass skyscraper and stadium lights against the evening sky

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering skyscraper and bright stadium lights, then returning gaze to the gym floor

notable_agents.action: shirtless man performing weightlifting exercises with barbells

entered.detail: towering modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and red neon accents near the top
tall pole with multiple bright floodlights illuminating the plaza
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: In the open gym plaza, the camera tilts upward to reveal a stunning view of a glass skyscraper against the darkening sky, with bright stadium lights on the left. The scene transitions back down to show NPCs working out among the equipment, with digital billboards glowing in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: active outdoor gym with weightlifting stations

agents.ego_description: navigating through the outdoor gym floor, weaving between weightlifters and exercise equipment while approaching a stair structure

notable_agents.action: man in green shorts practicing boxing movements with dumbbells
woman performing deadlifts with heavy barbell

entered.detail: multiple heavy barbells with weight plates scattered across the concrete floor
red punching bag suspended from a blue metal frame
elevated walkway with stairs and green structural supports crossing above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the active outdoor gym, navigating between NPCs engaged in various workouts—boxing, weightlifting, and strength training. The area is filled with barbells, punching bags, and exercise equipment, while an overhead pedestrian bridge with green trim spans the background, and large digital billboards illuminate the scene with colorful advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, tree-lined pedestrian walkway into a vibrant, neon-lit outdoor gym plaza. It begins by gliding past mature trees and a commercial building with green trim, where the fading natural light of dusk blends with a warm artificial glow. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed path opens into a concrete plaza, passing by green recycling bins and scattered pedestrians before the gym equipment comes into view. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal a towering glass skyscraper against the darkening sky and bright stadium lights, before shifting back down to the active workout area. Finally, the camera navigates through the gym among NPCs boxing and lifting weights, surrounded by punching bags and glowing digital billboards beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge.
